blended.narrative: Winter Park is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,249 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
